tasks.name: Create activity item discriminated union types
tasks.purpose: Define TypeScript discriminated union types for activity items from different sources (lessons, quizzes, assessments, presentations)

constraints: Must use discriminated union with activity_type field
Each type must include: id, type, title, timestamp, optional link
Follow existing type patterns from database.types.ts

tasks.input_state: No activity types exist. Database types for lesson_progress, quiz_attempts, survey_responses, building_blocks_submissions are available from database.types.ts
tasks.output_state: ActivityItem discriminated union type defined with LessonActivity, QuizActivity, AssessmentActivity, and PresentationActivity variants. All types exported from activity.types.ts
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Type file exists with ActivityItem discriminated union. pnpm typecheck passes. All 4 activity variants are exported.
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'export type ActivityItem' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/types/activity.types.ts && grep -q 'LessonActivity | QuizActivity | AssessmentActivity | PresentationActivity' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/types/activity.types.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create activity aggregation loader function
tasks.purpose: Implement server-side loader function that aggregates recent activity from lesson_progress, quiz_attempts, survey_responses, and building_blocks_submissions tables using UNION ALL pattern

constraints: Must use UNION ALL (not UNION) for performance
Limit each subquery to 5 items before union
Must use RLS-aware queries with user_id filtering
Must wrap with React.cache() for deduplication
Use subquery pattern: user_id = (select auth.uid()) for performance

tasks.input_state: Activity types defined in T1. Server directory exists. No activity loader exists yet.
tasks.output_state: activity.loader.ts created with loadRecentActivities function. Function returns ActivityItem[] sorted by timestamp (newest first). Function wrapped with cache(). Query uses UNION ALL with per-source limits.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Loader function exists, returns ActivityItem[], uses UNION ALL pattern, applies RLS filtering, and passes typecheck
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'export const loadRecentActivities' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/server/activity.loader.ts && grep -q 'UNION ALL' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/server/activity.loader.ts && grep -q 'cache(' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/server/activity.loader.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add activity data to dashboard loader
tasks.purpose: Integrate loadRecentActivities into the existing dashboard loader's Promise.all parallel fetch, adding activity data to the DashboardData type

constraints: Must add to existing Promise.all for parallel execution
Must handle errors gracefully with fallback to empty array
Must update DashboardData type to include activities field

tasks.input_state: Dashboard loader exists with parallel fetching for other widgets. Activity loader exists from T2. DashboardData type exists but has no activities field.
tasks.output_state: Dashboard loader calls loadRecentActivities in Promise.all. DashboardData type includes activities: ActivityItem[]. Error handling returns empty array on failure.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Dashboard loader includes activity fetching in Promise.all. DashboardData type updated with activities field. Typecheck passes.

tasks.name: Add unit tests for activity loader
tasks.purpose: Create unit tests verifying the activity loader returns correct structure, handles empty data gracefully, and applies proper user filtering

constraints: Test empty data returns empty array
Test that items are sorted by timestamp (newest first)
Test that user filtering is applied
Follow existing test patterns from the codebase

tasks.input_state: Activity loader function exists from T2. No tests exist for activity loader.
tasks.output_state: Unit test file created with tests for loadRecentActivities. All tests pass. Tests verify structure, sorting, filtering, and empty state handling.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Test file exists with at least 3 test cases. All tests pass with pnpm --filter web test.
